attacking_style: Does not initiate traditional attacks; operates as a time trial specialist who actively hunts bonus seconds in reduced sprints when in contention, racing opportunistically rather than aggressively.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support patterns; bike change strategy employed during mountain stages suggests team awareness of limitations on steep gradients.
terrain_preference: Time trial specialist exposed on steep climbing gradients. Can contest reduced bunch sprints. Struggles particularly on sustained mountain TT finishes with severe gradients.
vulnerability: Catastrophic fade on steep climbing gradients in time trials, losing 2+ minutes in final kilometers. Cannot defend race lead when course features significant elevation with gradient spikes.
key_patterns: Active bonus second hunting when in race leader position, finishing third in reduced sprint (1 observation)
Severe time losses on climbing TT finishes, fading catastrophically in final kilometers (2 observations)
Time trial specialist profile fundamentally compromised by inability to sustain power on steep gradients (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Catastrophic collapse in climbing TT despite race leader status indicates fundamental weakness exposed under pressure in 2022 Romandie
